accents.model-deepseek.fix: Lightened #4060FF → #6070FF (+32R +16G +0B). Original deep-indigo blue was 3.99:1 on card — near-black card (#130A1A) makes this the hardest pairing in the theme. #6070FF keeps the hue firmly in neon-blue-indigo territory without crossing into the cyan range occupied by accent-gpt (#00FFFF). Outrun's character is maximalist neon; this adjustment shifts the blue ~20% brighter while preserving its identity.
accents.model-deepseek.wcag: AA 4.5:1 normal text — all surfaces pass
accents.model-deepseek.character-note: Outrun deepseek required the largest absolute lightening of all fixes in this session (+32 on red channel). The near-black card surface (#130A1A) leaves little headroom for dark blues. The new value is the minimum brightness that achieves AA compliance while keeping the color distinguishable from accent-gpt cyan.

accents.model-gemini.fix: Lightened #BF00FF → #C828FF (+9R +40G +0B). Increases green channel minimally to brighten without shifting hue toward red. Prior value was 4.29:1 on card — moderate failure. The green-channel increase rather than pure lightening keeps the purple from drifting toward hot pink (occupied by accent-other #FF00AA).
accents.model-gemini.wcag: AA 4.5:1 normal text — all surfaces pass
accents.model-gemini.character-note: Outrun gemini retains full neon-purple character. The adjustment is deliberately small — #BF00FF to #C828FF — to preserve the aggressive saturation that defines Outrun's palette. The green channel addition is visually imperceptible as a hue shift.
